name_en: 【Top Grade】M82958 Blue Denim! 👏🏻👏🏻 Zippy Wallet. This zip wallet reinterprets the Louis Vuitton Monogram Dld pattern using Monogram jacquard denim woven with a stonewashed effect. Size: 19.5*10.5*2.5cm. 🎁🎁
